metadata.description: Turn a clarified goal into an acceptance-tested specification.

action.description: Write a bounded feature specification with observable acceptance criteria.

gate.condition: The specification has testable acceptance criteria and explicit non-goals.

evidence.description: Acceptance criteria map product intent to observable behavior.

stopConditions: Product intent or acceptance behavior remains ambiguous.
The proposed work exceeds the feature boundary.

requiredPermissions.reason: Retrieve product, architecture, and memory context.
